open_repo_assist_prs.note: Created 2026-05-18. Adds patchDocument() for partial document updates without full replacement. Uses batchWriteItems.

future_work.type_improvement: batchGetItems return type is Array<T | undefined> but implementation never returns undefined — could narrow to Array<T>; deferred as low priority
future_work.missing_features_noted: DynamoDbRepository: scan, transactWrite/transactGet still missing. JsonPointerRepository: patchDocument now done. Next: listDocumentIds (needs GSI) or scan.
future_work.maintainer_note: Maintainer merged all 16 open Repo Assist PRs between 2026-05-08 and 2026-05-18. Maintainer also added batchWriteItems directly and fixed standardize enum casing. Current main is v1.12.1.

notes: MAJOR UPDATE 2026-05-18: All 16 previously open Repo Assist PRs have been merged by maintainer. Repository advanced from v1.9.2 to v1.12.1. Maintainer added batchWriteItems themselves (feat: add batchWriteItems with recursive retry and fix filter function casing). getItemsPage now in. All 11 open issues are system-generated. No user-filed issues. PR #41 (TBD): feat: patchDocument for JsonPointerRepository. Also fixed pre-existing lint error in DynamoDbRepository.test.ts (unused PageResult import). npm outdated check still clean as of v1.9.2 — needs recheck.
